title: Make an analysis reproducible
description: Combine renv pinning, a seeded R Markdown render, and a clean-session check.
body: Steps: 1. Initialize renv and snapshot dependencies to renv.lock. 2. Put the analysis in an R Markdown document so code and output render together. 3. Set a random seed before any stochastic step. 4. Render in a fresh session to catch hidden global-environment dependencies. 5. Restore on a second machine from the lockfile and re-render. Rollback point: before upgrading any pinned package. Validation: a clean-session render reproduces identical figures and tables.
